behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: three collectors -> aggregator/context builder -> summary call payload. A unit test of one parser cannot catch missing-source wiring bugs. Rejected System: behavior does not require real HTTP/network semantics; in-process fakes for the three source clients can expose omission/merge bugs. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: this behavior checks pre-summary input assembly, not model decision quality or multi-agent sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real data-collection and report-assembly modules together with stubbed source clients returning distinct sentinel fields per source, execute one report run, and assert the exact payload passed into summary-generation contains all three source sections/keys.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module error propagation and fallback rendering: source client failure -> section status mapping -> report assembly. Unit is too low because abort-vs-degrade behavior appears at handoff boundaries. Rejected System: behavior text only says unavailable; this can be reproduced with a client error/timeout stub without real network/OS. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on model output correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Run report generation with two source clients returning data and one client raising an availability error; assert the run completes, the affected section contains `data unavailable`, unaffected sections remain populated, and no global abort/exception escapes.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on summary content quality (faithful representation of key values), which is a model judgment problem; deterministic stubs would hide hallucination/misstatement failures. Rejected Integration by behavior text `accurately represents` because infrastructure-only checks cannot validate real model output fidelity. Rejected Workflow: only one agentic decision point (summary generation), not multiple agentic stages.
behaviors.test_description: Use a fixed hard-case canary dataset with unambiguous key values, call the real summary model, and score outputs against factuality checks (all required key values present, no contradictory numbers) across repeated runs with a pass-rate threshold.

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Real failure boundary is external delivery infrastructure: end-to-end execution must traverse actual email transport and inbox receipt. Mocks can falsely pass while SMTP/API auth, routing, or provider acceptance fails. Rejected Agentic: behavior verifies successful delivery to inbox, not quality of model decisions. Rejected Workflow: no requirement for multiple agentic steps in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the script in an environment using real source endpoints (or production-like reachable test endpoints) and a real email delivery path to a test mailbox; assert one run produces an inbox message for configured recipients with expected report structure and attachments/body sections.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Primary failure is state handoff across modules/runs: delivery failure handling -> local persistence -> next-run retry loader -> resend. This can be caught with real local filesystem plus controlled mail-client failure in-process. Rejected System: behavior does not require real scheduler or real network outage; invoking two sequential runs with a failing then recovering mail client reproduces the failure mode. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: retry logic is infrastructure/stateful, not model-output dependent.
behaviors.test_description: Run once with mail client forced to unreachable error and assert report is persisted locally; run again with mail client healthy and assert persisted report is retried/sent and local retry artifact is cleared or marked delivered.
